name: clooks-project-hooks
description: Project-configured hooks: enforce project scripts, protected paths, and JS/TS package manager choice
author: codestripes-dev

js-package-manager-guard.description: Blocks wrong JS/TS package managers, runners, and runtimes. Configure allowed tools in clooks.yml.

no-edit-protected.description: Blocks Write/Edit/MultiEdit on protected paths (lock files, vendor dirs, minified assets, and custom rules)

prefer-project-scripts.description: Blocks bare CLI tools when project scripts exist. Configure mappings in clooks.yml.
